entries.source: A clear front that asks one idea.
entries.value: Ideia bakarra galdetzen duen aurrealde argia.

entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.
entries.value: Ohiko tranpa bat, litekeen akats batez ohartarazten duena.

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: Pentsamendua osatzen duen atzealde laburra.

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: Dena eman gabe laguntzen duen pista.

entries.source: A review choice so missed cards return sooner.
entries.value: Berrikuspen-aukera bat, huts egindako txartelak lehenago itzul daitezen.

entries.source: A simple flashcard workflow
entries.value: Ikasketa-txartelen lan-fluxu sinplea

entries.source: A stronger card asks for recall:
entries.value: Txartel sendoago batek gogoratzea eskatzen du:

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: Txartel erabilgarri batek gauza bakarra galdetzen du. Ez lituzke bost galdera prompt bakarrean ezkutatu behar. Erantzuteko adinako zehatza izan behar du, baina ez hain estua esanahirik gabe gelditzeko.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: AI ikasketa-txartel ahul batek dio:

entries.source: active recall
entries.value: itzurri aktiboa

entries.source: Add hints without giving away the answer
entries.value: Gehitu pistak erantzuna agerian utzi gabe

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AIak ikasketa-txartelak azkarrago egiten lagun dezake, baina ikaskuntza gogoratze-lanetik dator oraindik. Tresnak txartelak idazten baditu eta ikaslea inoiz ez bada erantzuten saiatzen, ia ezer ez da aldatu. Bertsio erabilgarriak ohar nahasiak prompt fokuratu bihurtzen ditu, eta gero ikaslea erantzuna erakutsi aurretik gogoratzera behartzen du.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AIak ohar zakarrak gogoratze-prompt garbiago bihur ditzake. Ideia zabalak txartel txikiagoetan zatitu, adibideak gehitu eta ikasleak galdu ditzakeen tranpak identifika ditzake.

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: AI ikasketa-txartelak eta gogoratze aktiboa: nola gogoratu gehiago

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: aplikatu kontzeptu bat adibide txiki bati.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Eskatu ideia bakarreko txartelak, pistekin eta ohiko tranpekin.

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: Atzealdea: "Tartekatzeak memoriari erantzuna berreraikitzera behartzen dio ahazte pixka baten ondoren, eta horrek geroko gogoratzea indartzen du."

entries.source: compare two ideas;
entries.value: konparatu bi ideia;

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: definitu termino bat;

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: Ezabatu zabalegiak edo agerikoegiak diren txartelak.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Ez berrikusi dena berdin

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Erraza. Bultza geroagorako.

entries.source: explain a cause;
entries.value: azaldu kausa bat;

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Ikasketa-txartelak hau egiteko modurik sinpleenetako bat dira.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Ikasketa-txartelak indartsuak dira, baina ez dira ikasketa-prozesu osoa. Onenak dira gogoratzerako, hiztegirako, definizioetarako, formuletarako, bereizketetarako eta adibide nagusietarako. Ahulagoak dira ikasleak ideia hasieratik ulertu ez duenean.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Ikasketa-txartelak ondoen funtzionatzen dute aldi bakoitzean ideia bakarra probatzen dutenean, erantzunak ahaleginaren ondoren bakarrik erakusten dituztenean eta huts egindako txartelak lehenago berrikusten dituztenean.

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Ibilbide sakonago baterako, irakurri Flashcard Builder gida eta Flashcard Builder promptak eta ikasketa-zikloa. Helburua ez da karta-sorta eder bat. Helburua oharrak joan direnean gehiago gogoratzea da.

entries.source: For example:
entries.value: Adibidez:

entries.source: Front: "Why does spaced review work better than cramming?"
entries.value: Aurrealdea: "Zergatik funtzionatzen du berrikuspen tartekatuak azken orduko pilaketak baino hobeto?"

entries.source: Hard. Review after a short delay.
entries.value: Zaila. Berrikusi atzerapen labur baten ondoren.

entries.source: Hint: "Think about forgetting and retrieval."
entries.value: Pista: "Pentsatu ahazteari eta gogoratzeari buruz."

entries.source: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.
entries.value: Pistak erabilgarriak dira ahalegina mantentzen dutenean. Pista txarra erantzuna da mozorropean. Pista onak bilaketa-eremua estutzen du.

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: identifikatu ohiko akats bat;

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: Txartel batek huts egiten jarraitzen badu, ez errepikatu bakarrik. Galdetu zergatik den zaila. Erabili Socratic Instruction uste okerra agerian uzteko, Math Step Coach prozedura-hutsuneetarako, edo AI ikaskuntza-prompten liburutegia ikasketa-prompt hobe bat aurkitzeko.

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: inspir-en Flashcard Builder gogoratze aktiboko ziklo horren inguruan diseinatuta dago: eraiki sorta bat, saiatu aurrealdea, erakutsi erantzuna, baloratu gogoratzea eta berrikusi hutsak ideia itsatsi arte.

entries.source: Missed. Review soon.
entries.value: Huts egin du. Berrikusi laster.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: Ikasleek egiten duten akats bat txartel guztiak berdin tratatzea da. Txartel bat berehala badakizu, bihar berriro berrikusteak denbora alferrik galdu dezake. Txartel bat huts egiten baduzu, aste bat itxarotea luzeegia izan daiteke.

entries.source: Pair flashcards with understanding
entries.value: Parekatu ikasketa-txartelak ulermenarekin

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Itsatsi ohar-zati txiki bat Flashcard Builder-en.

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Fotosintesia: landareek elikagaia egiteko erabiltzen duten prozesua.

entries.source: Rate recall honestly.
entries.value: Baloratu gogoratzea zintzotasunez.

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Oharrak irakurtzeak emankorra dirudi. Geroago gogoratzea da benetako proba.

entries.source: remember a sequence;
entries.value: gogoratu sekuentzia bat;

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Berrikusi atzealdeari begiratu gabe.

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: Txartel sendoek sarritan hau dute:

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: ikasketa-trebetasunak

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: Pista horrek ikasleari hasten laguntzen dio gogoratzearen ekintza kendu gabe. inspir-en Flashcard Builder agertu-eta-baloratu ziklo honetarako diseinatuta dago: saiatu lehenik, erakutsi gero, baloratu zintzoki, eta ekarri txartel ahulak lehenago.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: Horregatik da garrantzitsua gogoratze aktiboa. Erantzuna begiratu ordez, memoriatik ateratzen saiatzen zara. Ahaleginak memoria indartzen du eta oraindik zer landu behar den erakusten du.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: Ikasleak oraindik gogoratu behar du. Hori da kontua.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: Bigarren txartelak ikasleari erlazio bat gogoratzeko eskatzen dio, ez esaldi bat ezagutzeko bakarrik. Txartel onek normalean lan hauetako batean jartzen dute fokua:

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: Horrek ez du konplexua izan behar. Garrantzitsuena da zure berrikuspen-ordutegiak memoriari erantzutea, sorta zerrenda estatiko gisa tratatu ordez.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Probatu Flashcard Builder-en. Txartelak egin aurretik gaia ulertu behar baduzu, hasi Learn Anything-en. Txartelak berrikusi ondoren presioa nahi baduzu, jo Quiz Me On Trivia edo Viva Practice-ra.

entries.source: Turn notes into better cards
entries.value: Bihurtu oharrak txartel hobeetan

entries.source: Turn repeated misses into a question for Learn Anything.
entries.value: Bihurtu behin eta berrizko hutsak Learn Anything-rako galdera batean.

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: Erabili ziklo hau:

entries.source: Use three ratings:
entries.value: Erabili hiru balorazio:

entries.source: What is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?
entries.value: Zein da klorofilaren eginkizuna fotosintesian?

entries.source: What makes a good flashcard
entries.value: Zerk egiten du flashcard on bat

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Oharrak AIan itsasten dituzunean, eskatu ideia zabalak zeregin horietan banatzeko. 18 karta zehatz dituen sorta bat, normalean, paragrafo oso bat duten 5 karta erraldoi baino hobea da.

entries.source: Where AI helps
entries.value: AIak non laguntzen duen
